title: Expansive conciousness is better than limited conciousness

transcript.text: Okay, hello. This video is the benefits of expansive consciousness. It's better to have an expansive consciousness than a limited consciousness.

And I think the ones of those people who will not feel left out and feel like they're right all the time are the people with the expansive consciousnesses, the open-minded people.
